name: Basic Custard Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 8 cups bread, 1-inch dice, day old or more than one day old
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the steamer insert into a wok.
2. Pour water into the wok until it reaches about halfway up the side of the insert.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine eggs, sugar, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla extract.
4. Pour 1/3 of this mixture into the bottom of a 1 1/2-quart oven-proof casserole dish.
5. Add 1/3 of the bread (diced) and raisins to the dish.
6. Press down until the bread absorbs some liquid.
7. Continue layering with the remaining ingredients, ending with the milk mixture.
8. Press down until the bread absorbs most of the liquid.
9. Place the casserole dish on the steamer insert, covering it with waxed paper.
10. Cover the wok and set the heat control dial to 250°F or adjust for medium flame.
11. Check the water level after 30 minutes; add more as needed, ensuring the wok does not become dry.
12. Steam until a knife inserted 1 inch from the center comes out clean, about an hour.
13. Serve warm or cold with whipped cream or ice cream.
